Sri Lanka Players on Pakistan Tour ‘Threatened With Review’

Nov 13, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Sri Lanka Players on Pakistan Tour ‘Threatened With Review’

Reports from Colombo indicate that several Sri Lankan national players have been warned that opting out of the upcoming Pakistan tour could lead to a review of their central contracts and commitments. Rising safety concerns have led many players to hesitate, prompting strong reactions from cricket authorities.
